Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Yvonne Vixen is present.
Attorney RICHARD SHUPPACK appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ANDY WESTLEY, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of FEBRUARY 3, 2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
